steps.hint_text: Namespace listesi icin `ip netns list` kullan.

questions.scenario: Kesinti incelemesinde `testns` namespace'i icinde 10.21.31.41'e 4 paket ping gonder.

steps.hint_text: Namespace icinde komut icin `ip netns exec` kullan.

questions.scenario: Yeni acilan hostta `10.0.0.0/24` kaynakli trafik icin policy route ekle: table 100.

steps.hint_text: Policy route icin `ip rule add from subnet table N` kullan.

questions.scenario: Runbook adiminda route table 100 kayitlarini goster.

steps.hint_text: Ozel route tablosu icin `ip route show table` kullan.

questions.scenario: Operasyon kontrolunde eth0 icin 400MB'lik 5 dosyalik rolling tcpdump capture baslat.

steps.hint_text: Rolling capture icin `-C size -W count` kullan.

questions.scenario: Incident sonrasinda conntrack tablo istatistiklerini goster.

steps.hint_text: Conntrack stats icin `conntrack -S` kullan.

questions.scenario: Bakim oncesi mevcut nftables ruleset'ini tamamen temizle.

steps.hint_text: Tum ruleset'i bosaltmak icin `nft flush ruleset` kullan.

questions.scenario: Troubleshooting sirasinda eth0 uzerine `fq_codel` qdisc ekle.

steps.answer: tc qdisc add dev eth0 root fq_codel
steps.hint_text: Traffic control qdisc icin `tc qdisc add dev ... root fq_codel` kullan.

questions.scenario: Deploy sonrasi eth0 qdisc istatistiklerini detayli goster.

steps.hint_text: Qdisc stats icin `tc -s qdisc show` kullan.
